title: SMARCH Evaluation Run
description: Result emitted by the shipped tools/evals performance bench, including its fixture volume, CI headroom, timing, and individual budget results.

x-sma-contract.change_policy: Optional additive fields preserve v1 compatibility; required, renamed, or narrowed fields require a new versioned $id and schema_version.
x-sma-contract.rollback: Keep the v1 report reader and ignore additive metrics when rolling back. Never rewrite historical measurements.
x-sma-contract.lifecycle: Created for one benchmark execution, consumed by its gate/reporting path, and retained with CI evidence when required.
x-sma-contract.retention: Retain with the CI run or release evidence; local ad-hoc results may be discarded.
x-sma-contract.performance: This schema records performance measurements; validating the static report has no database query or index budget.

schema_version.description: Numeric report schema version emitted by the current benchmark.

baseline.description: Machine baseline used to interpret budgets.

fixture_file_count.description: Number of files in the generated realistic-volume fixture.

headroom_percent.description: CI headroom applied above the published budget.

passed.description: True when every selected metric remained within its gate limit.

results.description: Bounded metric results for the selected benchmark set.

gate_limit.description: Budget after CI headroom is applied.

passed.description: Whether the observed value was below the gate limit.
